title: The Sorcerer's Lexicon
storySnippet: The sorcerer's enchanted lexicon hurls tricky words at you -- only perfect spelling can break the curse.

data.sentenceContext: The thief made a surreptitious entry through the castle window at night.
The villagers rebelled against the tyrannical ruler who taxed them unfairly.
Mediterranean cuisine features olive oil, fresh herbs, and seafood.
The pharmaceutical company developed a new medicine for the plague.
The allies planned their rendezvous at the abandoned watchtower.
Removing the sacred stone was deemed sacrilegious by the high priestess.
Cold, damp weather often worsens rheumatism in those who suffer from it.
The census questionnaire asked about each household's crops and livestock.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: She cast a ___ glance at the forbidden scroll when no one was watching.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ king silenced anyone who dared to disagree with him.
data.hint: Exercising power in a cruel or oppressive way

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The apothecary studied ___ ingredients to create healing potions.
data.hint: Related to the preparation of medicines

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The two scouts agreed on a ___ point near the river at dawn.
data.hint: A planned meeting at a specific time and place
